programme.title: Border Security: Canada's Front Line: Packing Heat
programme.desc: Officers question a man from Texas who arrives with his hunting equipment.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Defying posted warnings, a snowboarder ventures into high-risk avalanche territory-and pays the price the SAR team faces a race against weather and terrain to extract him safely.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Avalanche risk turns deadly after a skier is caught in unstable snow the SAR team must use helicopters and controlled detonations to prevent further slides before attempting the rescue.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Several responders race to rescue an injured snowboarder we also see how they juggle family dinners, day jobs, and sleepless nights.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: The team races to find two overdue snowmobilers in the remote backcountry in harsh, low-visibility conditions.

programme.title: Air Rescue
programme.desc: A motorcycle rider falls off a cliff and is stuck in a ravine a family's waterskiing outing turns serious when a newlywed crashes a young boy's life is at risk after he is hit by a van while running to his mother.

programme.title: Air Rescue
programme.desc: The Westpac rescue crew is called to a holiday resort where there have been three accidents.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Chronicling the lives and work of conservation officers in America.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Chronicling the lives and work of conservation officers in America.

programme.title: Dropped: Project Yukon: Band of Ten
programme.desc: The team awakens to a thick layer of frost on their sleeping bags.

programme.title: Fight to Survive: Mischelle Hileman
programme.desc: Mischelle Hileman is deep in the Oregon wilderness on an elk hunt when she gets lost and injured and finds herself on the brink of death.

programme.title: Danger Decoded: Man Made: Man Made
programme.desc: The harrowing tales of the top 10 man-made disasters, from Beirut's blast to London's lethal smog, that have shaped humans' approaches to safety and technology.

programme.title: Danger Decoded: Man Made: Man Made
programme.sub-title: Humanity's Lessons in Catastrophe Part Two
programme.desc: From the Dust Bowl's devastation to Chernobyl's nuclear nightmare, the harrowing tales of the top 5 man-made disasters that reshaped the world.
